description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a smooth, slightly matte surface and deep black grooves forming a traditional panel pattern. The ball is spherical and appears to be made primarily of rubber or synthetic leather, with visible seams dividing the surface into eight distinct panels. The coloration is a classic burnt orange, commonly seen in professional and recreational basketballs, with the grooves providing both visual contrast and grip. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or signs of wear, suggesting it is either new or well-maintained. The inflation valve is not visible in any of the views, and the ball's size and proportions are consistent with regulation basketballs used in urban parks, gyms, and street courts.
description: A classic orange basketball with black grooves and a smooth, matte surface, divided into eight panels. No visible logos or wear, and the inflation valve is not shown.
description_view_0: The basketball is shown with its panel grooves forming a cross pattern, highlighting the deep black seams and the orange surface.
description_view_1: This view displays the basketball with only two horizontal grooves visible, giving a simpler appearance with less visible panel detail.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this angle shows the cross pattern of the grooves and the full panel arrangement on the orange surface.
description_view_3: Like view 1, this side shows two horizontal grooves, with minimal panel detail visible.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel pattern with deep black grooves forming a cross and curved segments, typical of regulation basketballs.
